recommendations.excerpt: The Academy Awards officially adopted the "Oscars" nickname in 1939. But who is Oscar, and who started calling them that? We may never know. But here are four enduring legends to consider.

recommendations.title: Why the War with Iran Could Be a Long One
recommendations.excerpt: The conditions that produce short wars are absent from Trump's war with Iran.

recommendations.title: How Conversation Works – and Why People With Hearing Loss Rely More on Their Powers of Prediction
recommendations.excerpt: We often think of conversation as effortless. In fact, it’s a finely tuned dance of listening and speaking.

recommendations.title: Jimmy Kimmel wins President’s Award – ‘I thought he hated me!’
recommendations.excerpt: Months after his ABC suspension, Jimmy Kimmel was honored for his "resilience" at the ICG Publicists Awards, where he took aim at President Trump.

recommendations.title: Men Are Sharing Difficult Parts of Modern Dating, and As a Woman, I Never Thought of Some of These
recommendations.excerpt: "After a while, trying to get a damn date for Saturday night feels like going hat in hand asking for money."

recommendations.title: Mysterious pipe pops up in Japan
recommendations.excerpt: Video shows a tall pipe suddenly bursting out of the ground at a construction site in Osaka, Japan, in a moment somewhat reminiscent of “Super Mario.” CNN’s Hanako Montgomery reports.

recommendations.title: Watch Exclusive Drone Footage of the Crowning of the Sagrada Família, the World’s Tallest Church
recommendations.excerpt: After more than a century of work, the Sagrada Família's central tower is in place. Here's how architects executed the 19th-century masterpiece design with 21st-century tools.

recommendations.title: Over puppy yoga? Try it with snakes.
recommendations.excerpt: You've heard of yoga with kittens, and goats, and maybe even reindeer… but what about a bunch of pythons and one baby Columbian Common Boa named Mango?
